title: hieracium murorum subsp. marginelliceps
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. marginelliceps, also known as Creeping Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. marginelliceps include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce fever, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from minor cuts and scrapes to more serious conditions such as wounds and infections.
